steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify all dependencies (t0001_stt_benchmark, t0007_ibm_granite_4_1_benchmark, t0009_parakeet_production_baseline) are completed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run SeACo-Paraformer-en batch and contextual-biased variants on all 93 gold-92 clips; compute metrics.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, prediction assets, and mark task completed.
